en: Then we're going to turn away from the camera, and then we're going to turn back around and see ourselves.
It's going to be one of those weird filters that you see on TikTok.
ko: 틱톡에서 보는 이상한 필터 중 하나처럼요.

en: The goal is not to laugh and keep the water in your mouth.
ko: 목표는 웃지 않고 입에 물을 유지하는 거예요.

en: Whoever laughs first loses that round. If you laugh...
ko: 누가 먼저 웃으면 그 라운드를 잃는 거죠. 웃으면...

en: What do I win? We make money or something? Or it's always the same thing?
You do all this crazy thing for nothing. No, it's...
ko: 이런 미친 짓을 아무것도 없이 하는 거예요."

en: No, just for the joy of...
I mean... Okay, just do it, do it, do it.
-♪ Funny Face Filter Challenge ♪ All right, drink as much water as you can.
We're doing it at the same time? Yeah, we're both doing it, and we both see it at the same time.
But I drink it. Yeah, and make sure we... But I drink the water.
No, don't drink the water. I keep it in the mouth. Keep it in the mouth. Okay.
